cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out this ethical dilemma about the restaurant manager and the employee. Let me start by understanding the problem. The manager has an employee who's consistently late and not doing his duties. The employee is a single father struggling financially. The manager has to decide whether to discipline him, which could cost him his job, or overlook the issues because of his personal situation. First, I should consider the different sides here. On one side, the restaurant needs to maintain standards. If employees are consistently late and not doing their jobs, it affects the business.
